Gollek
Docs Blog Install Features GitHub

Cloud LLM Providers

Seamless integration with leading cloud LLM providers including OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, and more.

Overview

Gollek provides unified abstractions for cloud-based LLM inference, enabling you to switch between providers with minimal code changes while maintaining consistent streaming, error handling, and configuration management.

Supported Providers

Provider Models Streaming Function Calling Multimodal Max Context
OpenAI GPT-4, GPT-3.5-Turbo, o1 ✓ ✓ ✓ 128K
Anthropic Claude 3 (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) ✓ ✓ ✓ 200K
Google Gemini Gemini Pro/Ultra ✓ ✓ ✓ 1M+
Cerebras Llama 3.1 ✓ ✗ ✗ 8K
Mistral Mistral, Mixtral ✓ ✓ ✗ 32K

Quick Start

Installation

Add the cloud provider dependencies to your project:

<dependency>
    <groupId>tech.kayys.gollek</groupId>
    <artifactId>gollek-ext-cloud-openai</artifactId>
    <version>1.0.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
</dependency>
<dependency>
    <groupId>tech.kayys.gollek</groupId>
    <artifactId>gollek-ext-cloud-anthropic</artifactId>
    <version>1.0.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
</dependency>

Configuration

# OpenAI Configuration
gollek.providers.openai.enabled=true
gollek.providers.openai.api-key=sk-...
gollek.providers.openai.base-url=https://api.openai.com
gollek.providers.openai.default-model=gpt-3.5-turbo

# Anthropic Configuration
gollek.providers.anthropic.enabled=true
gollek.providers.anthropic.api-key=sk-ant-...
gollek.providers.anthropic.base-url=https://api.anthropic.com
gollek.providers.anthropic.default-model=claude-3-sonnet-20240229

# Google Gemini Configuration
gollek.providers.gemini.enabled=true
gollek.providers.gemini.api-key=...
gollek.providers.gemini.default-model=gemini-pro

OpenAI Provider

Supported Models

Model Context Capabilities Best For
gpt-4-turbo 128K Text, Vision, Function Complex reasoning
gpt-4 8K Text, Vision, Function High-quality tasks
gpt-3.5-turbo 16K Text, Function Cost-effective
o1-preview 128K Reasoning Complex problems

Usage Example

import tech.kayys.gollek.provider.openai.OpenAiProvider;
import tech.kayys.gollek.spi.provider.ProviderRequest;
import tech.kayys.gollek.spi.inference.InferenceResponse;

// Inject or create provider
OpenAiProvider openAi = new OpenAiProvider();

// Create request
ProviderRequest request = ProviderRequest.builder()
    .model("gpt-4-turbo")
    .addMessage("system", "You are a helpful assistant.")
    .addMessage("user", "Explain quantum computing in simple terms.")
    .parameter("temperature", 0.7)
    .parameter("max_tokens", 500)
    .build();

// Execute inference
Uni<InferenceResponse> response = openAi.infer(request);
response.subscribe().with(resp -> {
    System.out.println(resp.getContent());
    System.out.println("Tokens used: " + resp.getTokensUsed());
});

Streaming Example

Multi<InferenceChunk> stream = openAi.inferStream(request);
stream.subscribe().with(
    chunk -> System.out.print(chunk.getToken()),
    error -> error.printStackTrace(),
    () -> System.out.println("\nStream complete!")
);

Advanced Configuration

# Custom endpoint (for Azure OpenAI or proxies)
gollek.providers.openai.base-url=https://your-resource.openai.azure.com

# Timeout and retries
gollek.providers.openai.timeout-seconds=60
gollek.providers.openai.max-retries=3

# Disable provider
gollek.providers.openai.enabled=false

Anthropic Provider

Supported Models

Model Context Capabilities Best For
claude-3-opus-20240229 200K Text, Vision, Function Complex analysis
claude-3-sonnet-20240229 200K Text, Vision, Function Balanced performance
claude-3-haiku-20240307 200K Text, Vision Fast, cost-effective

Usage Example

import tech.kayys.gollek.provider.anthropic.AnthropicProvider;
import tech.kayys.gollek.spi.provider.ProviderRequest;

AnthropicProvider anthropic = new AnthropicProvider();

ProviderRequest request = ProviderRequest.builder()
    .model("claude-3-sonnet-20240229")
    .addMessage("user", "Write a haiku about programming.")
    .parameter("max_tokens", 4096)  // Required for Anthropic
    .parameter("temperature", 0.7)
    .build();

Uni<InferenceResponse> response = anthropic.infer(request);

Streaming Example

Multi<InferenceChunk> stream = anthropic.inferStream(request);
stream.subscribe().with(
    chunk -> System.out.print(chunk.getToken()),
    error -> error.printStackTrace(),
    () -> System.out.println("\nDone!")
);

Anthropic-Specific Parameters

ProviderRequest request = ProviderRequest.builder()
    .model("claude-3-opus-20240229")
    .addMessage("user", "Your prompt here")
    .parameter("max_tokens", 4096)      // Required
    .parameter("temperature", 0.7)
    .parameter("top_p", 0.9)
    .parameter("top_k", 50)             // Anthropic-specific
    .build();

Google Gemini Provider

Supported Models

Model Context Capabilities Best For
gemini-pro 32K Text General tasks
gemini-ultra 1M+ Text, Vision Complex multimodal
gemini-1.5-pro 1M+ Text, Vision, Audio Long context

Usage Example

import tech.kayys.gollek.provider.gemini.GeminiProvider;

GeminiProvider gemini = new GeminiProvider();

ProviderRequest request = ProviderRequest.builder()
    .model("gemini-pro")
    .addMessage("user", "Explain machine learning.")
    .parameter("temperature", 0.7)
    .build();

Uni<InferenceResponse> response = gemini.infer(request);

Cerebras Provider

Supported Models

Model Context Speed Best For
llama3.1-8b 8K ~400 tokens/s Fast inference
llama3.1-70b 8K ~200 tokens/s High quality

Usage Example

import tech.kayys.gollek.provider.cerebras.CerebrasProvider;

CerebrasProvider cerebras = new CerebrasProvider();

ProviderRequest request = ProviderRequest.builder()
    .model("llama3.1-8b")
    .addMessage("user", "Quick response needed")
    .parameter("max_tokens", 100)
    .build();

// Cerebras is optimized for speed
Uni<InferenceResponse> response = cerebras.infer(request);

Provider Selection

Automatic Selection

Gollek can automatically select the best provider based on model name:

// Model name patterns trigger provider selection
"claude-*" → Anthropic Provider
"gpt-*" → OpenAI Provider  
"gemini-*" → Gemini Provider
"llama3.1-*" → Cerebras Provider

Manual Selection

ProviderRequest request = ProviderRequest.builder()
    .provider("openai")  // Explicit provider
    .model("gpt-4-turbo")
    .addMessage("user", "Hello")
    .build();

Error Handling

Authentication Errors

try {
    response = provider.infer(request);
} catch (ProviderAuthenticationException e) {
    // API key missing or invalid
    log.error("Authentication failed: " + e.getMessage());
}

Rate Limiting

try {
    response = provider.infer(request);
} catch (ProviderRateLimitException e) {
    // Retry after delay
    Thread.sleep(e.getRetryAfterMs());
    response = provider.infer(request);
}

Timeout Handling

Uni<InferenceResponse> response = provider.infer(request)
    .onFailure().retry().atMost(3)
    .onItemOrFailure().transform((result, failure) -> {
        if (failure != null) {
            return InferenceResponse.builder()
                .content("Request failed: " + failure.getMessage())
                .build();
        }
        return result;
    });

Best Practices

API Key Management

# Use environment variables (recommended)
export OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...
export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...
export GEMINI_API_KEY=...

# Or use secrets management
gollek.providers.openai.api-key=${OPENAI_API_KEY}

Cost Optimization

// Use cheaper models for simple tasks
ProviderRequest simpleRequest = ProviderRequest.builder()
    .model("gpt-3.5-turbo")  // Cheaper
    .addMessage("user", "Simple query")
    .build();

// Use premium models for complex tasks
ProviderRequest complexRequest = ProviderRequest.builder()
    .model("gpt-4-turbo")  // Higher quality
    .addMessage("user", "Complex reasoning task")
    .build();

Token Management

// Set explicit token limits
ProviderRequest request = ProviderRequest.builder()
    .parameter("max_tokens", 1000)  // Control output length
    .parameter("temperature", 0.5)   // More focused responses
    .build();

Configuration Reference

OpenAI

Property Default Description
gollek.providers.openai.enabled true Enable/disable provider
gollek.providers.openai.api-key - API key or env var
gollek.providers.openai.base-url https://api.openai.com API endpoint
gollek.providers.openai.default-model gpt-3.5-turbo Default model
gollek.providers.openai.timeout-seconds 30 Request timeout
gollek.providers.openai.max-retries 3 Max retry attempts

Anthropic

Property Default Description
gollek.providers.anthropic.enabled true Enable/disable provider
gollek.providers.anthropic.api-key - API key or env var
gollek.providers.anthropic.base-url https://api.anthropic.com API endpoint
gollek.providers.anthropic.default-model claude-3-sonnet-20240229 Default model
gollek.providers.anthropic.timeout-seconds 30 Request timeout
gollek.providers.anthropic.max-retries 3 Max retry attempts

Gemini

Property Default Description
gollek.providers.gemini.enabled true Enable/disable provider
gollek.providers.gemini.api-key - API key or env var
gollek.providers.gemini.default-model gemini-pro Default model
gollek.providers.gemini.timeout-seconds 30 Request timeout

Troubleshooting

Common Issues

“API key not configured”

# Set environment variable
export OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...

# Or configure in properties
gollek.providers.openai.api-key=sk-...

“Rate limit exceeded”

# Increase retry attempts
gollek.providers.openai.max-retries=5

# Or implement exponential backoff in your code

“Model not found”

// Check model name is correct
ProviderRequest.builder()
    .model("gpt-3.5-turbo")  // Not "gpt3.5" or "gpt-35"
    .build();

Resources

  • OpenAI API Documentation
  • Anthropic API Documentation
  • Google Gemini API Documentation
  • Cerebras API Documentation
